opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The itching and burning are so intense I can't sit still or sleep. It feels like my skin is on fire.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe vaginal itching and burning with thick white discharge after antibiotics is unbearable.

symptom_narrative.character: intense vulval itch and burning, thick white clumpy 'cottage-cheese' discharge, external stinging on urination, pain with sex
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't sit still or sleep, skin on fire
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: vulva/vagina (external burn when urine touches it)
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: thick white clumpy discharge, NO fishy/foul odour; recent 7-day antibiotic course 2 weeks ago; NO fever, no deep pelvic/lower-abdominal pain, no abnormal (green/frothy) or malodorous discharge

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recent sinus infection treated with antibiotics

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; recent antibiotics (predisposing); premenstrual flare

objective_data_offered.value: thick white clumpy 'cottage-cheese' discharge, no fishy/foul odour
no fever, no deep pelvic/lower-abdominal pain
